Assignment.expression: _. = ASSERT (((MEM_CORE0_DSPR_START & 0x0000001f) == 0x00000000), CORE0 DSPR start misaligned (32-Byte alignment)!)
_. = ASSERT (((MEM_CORE0_DSPR_END & 0x0000001f) == 0x00000000), CORE0 DSPR end misaligned (32-Byte alignment)!)
_. = ASSERT (((MEM_CORE0_PSPR_START & 0x0000001f) == 0x00000000), CORE0 PSPR start misaligned (32-Byte alignment)!)
_. = ASSERT (((MEM_CORE0_PSPR_END & 0x0000001f) == 0x00000000), CORE0 PSPR end misaligned (32-Byte alignment)!)
_. = ASSERT (((MEM_CORE1_DSPR_START & 0x0000001f) == 0x00000000), CORE1 DSPR start misaligned (32-Byte alignment)!)
_. = ASSERT (((MEM_CORE1_DSPR_END & 0x0000001f) == 0x00000000), CORE1 DSPR end misaligned (32-Byte alignment)!)
_. = ASSERT (((MEM_CORE1_PSPR_START & 0x0000001f) == 0x00000000), CORE1 PSPR start misaligned (32-Byte alignment)!)
_. = ASSERT (((MEM_CORE1_PSPR_END & 0x0000001f) == 0x00000000), CORE1 PSPR end misaligned (32-Byte alignment)!)
_. = ASSERT (((MEM_CORE2_DSPR_START & 0x0000001f) == 0x00000000), CORE2 DSPR start misaligned (32-Byte alignment)!)
_. = ASSERT (((MEM_CORE2_DSPR_END & 0x0000001f) == 0x00000000), CORE2 DSPR end misaligned (32-Byte alignment)!)
_. = ASSERT (((MEM_CORE2_PSPR_START & 0x0000001f) == 0x00000000), CORE2 PSPR start misaligned (32-Byte alignment)!)
_. = ASSERT (((MEM_CORE2_PSPR_END & 0x0000001f) == 0x00000000), CORE2 PSPR end misaligned (32-Byte alignment)!)

_. = ASSERT ((((((MEM_START_ADDR | 0x20000000) == (MEM_CORE0_START_ADDR | 0x20000000)) || ((MEM_START_ADDR | 0x20000000) == (MEM_CORE1_START_ADDR | 0x20000000))) || ((MEM_START_ADDR | 0x20000000) == (MEM_CORE2_START_ADDR | 0x20000000))) || ((MEM_START_ADDR | 0x20000000) == (MEM_LOADER_START_ADDR | 0x20000000))), Application does not start at an expected start address (cf. MEM_START_ADDR vs. MEM_COREx_START_ADDR)!)
_. = ASSERT (((LD_ISTACK & 0x00000007) == 0x00000000), Interrupt stack not doubleword aligned)
_. = ASSERT (((LD_USTACK & 0x00000007) == 0x00000000), User stack not doubleword aligned)
_. = ASSERT ((LD_CSA_SIZE >= MEM_CSA_MIN_SIZE), not enough memory for CSA)
_. = ASSERT (((LD_CSA_SIZE >> 0x00000006) > MEM_LCX_HEADROOM), LCX does not fit in CSA area)
_. = ASSERT ((LD_MPU_ISTACK_START == 0x50000000), Interrupt stack (LD_MPU_ISTACK_START) must start with first memory segment address!)
_. = ASSERT (((LD_MPU_LMU_DEFAULT_START & 0x00000007) == 0x00000000), LMU Default SRAM start (cached) misaligned (8-Byte alignment)!)
_. = ASSERT (((LD_MPU_LMU_DEFAULT_END & 0x00000007) == 0x00000000), LMU Default SRAM end (cached) misaligned (8-Byte alignment)!)
_. = ASSERT (((LD_MPU_LMU_DEFAULT_UC_START & 0x00000007) == 0x00000000), LMU Default SRAM start misaligned (8-Byte alignment)!)
_. = ASSERT (((LD_MPU_LMU_DEFAULT_UC_END & 0x00000007) == 0x00000000), LMU Default SRAM end misaligned (8-Byte alignment)!)
_. = ASSERT (((ADDR (.cpux_ivect) & 0x00007fe0) == 0x00000000), Cannot locate Interrupt Vector Table at this location (check output address of .cpux_ivect)!)
._ = ASSERT (((ADDR (.cpux_tvect) & 0x000000ff) == 0x00000000), The trap table should be located at least to a 256 Byte boundary address!)
._ = ASSERT (((ADDR (.safetlib_cpu_sbst_pspr) & 0xffffc000) == 0x50100000), SafeTLib SBST memory must be within first 16k of local PSPR!)
_. = ASSERT ((LD_MPU_ISTACK_START == 0x50000000), Interrupt stack (LD_MPU_ISTACK_START) must start with first memory segment address!)

_. = ASSERT (((((SEC_ZDATA_START_ADDR & 0x0fffc000) == 0x00000000) && ((SEC_ZDATA_END_ADDR & 0x0fffc000) == 0x00000000)) && ((SEC_ZDATA_START_ADDR & 0xf0000000) == (SEC_ZDATA_END_ADDR & 0xf0000000))), zdata section must be inside an absolute addressable memory region!)

_. = ASSERT (((((SEC_ZBSS_START_ADDR & 0x0fffc000) == 0x00000000) && ((SEC_ZBSS_END_ADDR & 0x0fffc000) == 0x00000000)) && ((SEC_ZBSS_START_ADDR & 0xf0000000) == (SEC_ZBSS_END_ADDR & 0xf0000000))), zbss section must be inside an absolute addressable memory region!)
_. = ASSERT ((((SIGNATURE_BLOCK_NEXT_LIST_END_ADDR - SIGNATURE_BLOCK_NEXT_LIST_START_ADDR) % 0x00000004) == 0x00000000), List of next signature block pointers has invalid size (multiple of 4)!)
_. = ASSERT (((SIGNATURE_BLOCK_APPLICATION_INFO_END_ADDR - SIGNATURE_BLOCK_NEXT_LIST_END_ADDR) >= 0x00000066), A valid application information block must be defined for each signature block instance)
_. = ASSERT (0x00000001, You must map both cached and uncached emem)
_. = ASSERT (0x00000001, You must map both cached and uncached emem)
_. = ASSERT (((LD_SYSTEM_HEAP_START & 0x00000007) == 0x00000000), SRAM HEAP not doubleword aligned)
_. = ASSERT (((LD_SYSTEM_HEAP_END - LD_SYSTEM_HEAP_START) >= MEM_SYSTEM_HEAP_MIN_SIZE), not enough memory for SRAM HEAP)
_. = ASSERT (((LD_USER_HEAP_END - LD_USER_HEAP_START) >= MEM_USER_HEAP_MIN_SIZE), not enough memory for HEAP)
_. = ASSERT ((SIZEOF (.unallocated) == 0x00000000), there are unallocated input sections)
